name: Archaeologist
description: Reads ruins, relics, and the ambitions of those reckless enough to disturb them.

name: Linguist
description: Deciphers dead tongues, temple iconography, and the warnings everyone else ignored.

name: Guide
description: Knows how to read the land, spot trouble early, and keep an expedition moving.

name: Daredevil
description: Crosses gaps, springs clear of traps, and survives on timing and nerve.

name: Bruiser
description: Breaks obstacles, statues, and bad ideas with blunt force and louder confidence.

name: Mystic
description: Senses curses, relic power, and the truths that old temples prefer to bury.
